brand.name: NEEHARIKA VELUVOLU
brand.title: Full Stack Developer | Frontend Developer | UI/UX Enthusiast
brand.tagline: Full Stack Developer | Frontend Developer | UI/UX Enthusiast

about.story: NEEHARIKA VELUVOLU is a motivated 2nd-year Computer Science student at SRM University AP with hands-on experience in full stack web development, frontend engineering, and UI/UX design. She is proficient in building responsive, user-centric web applications using modern frameworks and tools. She has demonstrated ability to deliver real-world projects in competitive hackathon environments.

projects.title: Educational Platform
projects.description: Built a full-featured educational platform enabling users to connect with peers for collaborative study, discover curated tutorials, and access structured learning roadmaps across various tech domains. Selected and presented at Fotex'36 Hackathon — a multi-college competitive event.

projects.title: Budget Tracking Website
projects.description: Developed a responsive personal finance and budget tracking web app with real-time expense categorization, visual dashboards, and spending analytics. Showcased at Vibecraft 2026, the annual tech fest at SRM University AP.

projects.title: Student Management System
projects.description: Designed and developed a student management portal supporting enrollment, grade management, and administrative workflows with role-based access control.

projects.title: Attendance Management System & Analytics
projects.description: Full stack attendance tracking system with automated reporting and interactive analytics dashboards to display attendance trends and flag at-risk students.

projects.title: Blogging Platform
projects.description: Multi-user blogging platform with full CRUD functionality, user authentication, rich text editing, comment system, and categorized post discovery.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology — Computer Science & Engineering
